content: Enable this option to allow all {{productName}} members to invite external guests to rooms.

comment.text: Enable all {{productName}} members to invite external guests to rooms on a portal. This setting affects room invitation permissions and is displayed in Portal Settings.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The verb 'Active' is used as an imperative in English, but in Spanish, 'Active' is the third-person singular present indicative. For an instruction/command, it should be 'Active' (formal imperative) or 'Activa' (informal), but 'Active' is actually the English word used incorrectly as a Spanish verb here. The correct Spanish imperative for 'Enable' in this context is 'Activa' or 'Habilita'.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Habilita esta opción para permitir que todos los miembros de {{productName}} inviten a invitados externos a las salas.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The Armenian word order and phrasing 'բոլոր {{productName}}-ի անդամներին թույլատրվի սենյակներ հրավիրել արտաքին հյուրերի' is grammatically incorrect and conveys a confusing meaning. It literally translates to something like 'to all members of {{productName}} be allowed to invite external guests rooms', where the object 'guests' and the destination 'rooms' are misplaced.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Միացրեք այս տարբերակը, որպեսզի {{productName}}-ի բոլոր անդամներին թույլատրվի սենյակներ հրավիրել արտաքին հյուրեր։

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The word 'ກຳນອນ' (kam-non) is used incorrectly; it appears to be a typo or a nonsensical word in this context. It likely intended to mean 'ກຳນົດ' (set/define) or was a mistranslation of 'members'. The sentence structure 'ອະນຸຍາກາດຕົວເລືອກນີ້' is also unnatural for 'Enable this option'.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: ເປີດໃຊ້ຕົວເລືອກນີ້ເພື່ອໃຫ້ສະມາຊິກ {{productName}} ທຸກຄົນສາມາດເຊີນແຂກພາຍນອກເຂົ້າສູ່ຫ້ອງໄດ້.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The Sinhala translation uses 'ඇමතීමට' (to call/shout) instead of 'ආරාධනා කිරීමට' (to invite). This changes the meaning from inviting guests to calling them.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: මෙම විකල්පය සක්‍රිය කිරීමෙන් {{productName}} සාමාජිකයින් සියලු දෙනාටම පිටත සිටින අමුත්තන්ව කාමරවලට ආරාධනා කිරීමට හැකි වනු ඇත.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The translation contains a redundant and awkward repetition of the verb 'omogočite' (to enable), which makes the sentence structure repetitive and slightly unnatural in Slovenian ('Omogočite... da omogočite...'). While not a total loss of meaning, it is a stylistic error that borders on a logic loop.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Omogočite to možnost, da vsi člani {{productName}} lahko povabijo zunanje goste v sobe.
